Tomato___Late_blight: Cause: Fungal disease. Remedy: Apply fungicide and remove infected leaves.
Tomato___Early_blight: Cause: Alternaria fungus. Remedy: Use copper fungicide and avoid overwatering.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Cause: Bacterial infection. Remedy: Remove infected leaves and apply bactericide.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold: Cause: High humidity fungus. Remedy: Improve ventilation and apply fungicide.
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot: Cause: Fungal infection. Remedy: Remove infected leaves and avoid wet foliage.
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider: Cause: Spider mites infestation. Remedy: Spray neem oil or insecticidal soap.
Tomato___Target_Spot: Cause: Fungal disease. Remedy: Use fungicides and rotate crops.
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus: Cause: Viral infection spread by whiteflies. Remedy: Control insects and remove infected plants.
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus: Cause: Viral disease. Remedy: Remove infected plants and disinfect tools.
Tomato___healthy: Healthy plant detected. No disease symptoms found.
Potato___Early_blight: Cause: Fungal disease. Remedy: Use disease-free seeds and fungicide.
Potato___Late_blight: Cause: Water mold infection. Remedy: Remove infected leaves and spray fungicide.
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot: Cause: Bacterial infection. Remedy: Use copper spray and avoid overhead watering.
Apple___Apple_scab: Cause: Fungal disease. Remedy: Apply fungicide during growing season.
Apple___Black_rot: Cause: Fungus. Remedy: Remove infected fruits and branches.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust: Cause: Rust fungus. Remedy: Use resistant varieties and fungicides.
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: Cause: Fungal rust disease. Remedy: Use resistant hybrids and fungicides.
Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight: Cause: Fungus. Remedy: Crop rotation and resistant varieties.
